revision.text:
[[commons:Category:Ichihara-jinja, Namerikawa]][[ja:櫟原神社]] {{Expand Japanese|櫟原神社}} {{Infobox religious building | name = Ichihara Shrine | native_name = 櫟原神社 | image = Yanagihara, Namerikawa, Toyama Prefecture 936-0023, Japan - panoramio.jpg | mapframe = yes | mapframe-zoom = 15 | mapframe-wikidata = yes | mapframe-point = none | map_type = Japan | map_caption = Ichihara Shrine | coordinates = {{coord|36.768921|137.340439}} | map_relief = 1 | religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] }} {{nihongo|'''Ichihara Shrine'''|櫟原神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Etchū Province]]. == instance of (P31) == * {{ill|Shinto shrine|lt=Shinto shrine|ar|جينجا|arz|ضريح شنتو|bcl|Shinto shrine|ca|Jinja|cs|Šintoistická svatyně|da|Shinto-tempel|de|Shintō-Schrein|el|Σιντοϊστικό Ιερό|en|Shinto shrine|eo|Ŝintoa sanktejo|es|Jinja|eu|Jinja|fa|معبد شینتویی|fi|Šintolainen pyhäkkö|fr|Sanctuaire shinto|hi|शिंतो मंदिर|hr|Šintoistički hram|hu|Sintó szentély|id|Jinja|it|Jinja|ja|神社|ka|ძინძია|ko|신사 (신토)|lb|Shintō-Schräin|mr|शिंतो मंदिर|nl|Jinja (heiligdom)|no|Jinja|or|ଜିଞ୍ଜା|pl|Jinja|pt|Templo xintoísta|ru|Дзиндзя|sc|Jinja|simple|Shinto shrine|sl|Šintoistično svetišče|sr|Шинтоистички храм|sv|Jinja|th|ศาลเจ้าชินโต|tr|Şinto tapınağı|uk|Святилище (синто)|vi|Thần xã|wuu|神社|zh_yue|神社|zh|神社|qid=Q845945|1=Shinto shrine}} * {{ill|Shikinaisha|lt=Shikinaisha|en|Shikinaisha|zh|式內社|qid=Q134917286|1=Shikinaisha}} * {{ill|Shikinai Shosha|lt=Shikinai Shōsha|en|Shikinai Shosha|ja|式内小社|simple|Shikinai Shosha|qid=Q134917287|1=Shikinai Shosha}} * {{ill|Q135160342|ltq=Q135160342|qid=Q135160342|1=Kokuhei-sha}} * {{ill|Q135038714|ltq=Q135038714|qid=Q135038714|1=Disputed Shikinaisha or Shikigeisha}}Kokugakuin University Shrine database * {{ill|Q135419779|ltq=Q135419779|qid=Q135419779|1=Shikinai Supershrine}} == part of (P361) == * {{ill|List of Shikinaisha in Etchū Province|lt=List of Shikinaisha in Etchū Province|ja|越中国の式内社一覧|qid=Q11636380|1=List of Shikinaisha in Etchū Province}} ** Series ordinal: 29 ** P155: {{ill|Q135040386|ltq=Q135040386|qid=Q135040386|1=Takeihakatsuno Shrine}} ** P156: {{ill|Yagokorōoichihiko Shrine|lt=Yagokorōoichihiko Shrine|ja|八心大市比古神社|qid=Q11391120|1=Yagokorōoichihiko Shrine}} == located in the administrative territorial entity (P131) == * {{ill|Q823513|ltq=Q823513|qid=Q823513|1=Namerikawa, Toyama}} * {{ill|Q906899|ltq=Q906899|qid=Q906899|1=Etchū Province}} * {{ill|Niikawa district|lt=Niikawa district|ja|新川郡|zh|新川郡|qid=Q11502110|1=Niikawa district}} == coordinate location (P625) == * {{coord|36.768921|137.340439}}https://geocode.csis.u-tokyo.ac.jp/home/simple-geocoding/ ᥓᥣᥱ ᥙᥣᥢᥱ|tet|Japaun|te|జపాన్|tg|Ҷопон|th|ประเทศญี่ปุ่น|thnews|หมวดหมู่:ประเทศญี่ปุ่น|tig|ጃፓን|ti|ጃፓን|tk|Ýaponiýa|tl|Hapon|tly|Japonijə|tn|Japan|tok|ma Nijon|to|Siapani|tpi|Siapan|trv|Tanah Tunux|tr|Japonya|trnews|Kategori:Japonya|trquote|Japonya|trvoyage|Japonya|ts|Japani|tt|Япония|tum|Japan|tw|Japan|tyv|Япония|ty|Tāpōnē|udm|Япония|ug|ياپونىيە|uk|Японія|uknews|Категорія:Японія|ukquote|Японія|ukvoyage|Японія|ur|جاپان|uz|Yaponiya|vec|Japon|vep|Japonii|ve|Japan|vi|Nhật Bản|vibooks|Các quốc gia/Nhật Bản|vivoyage|Nhật Bản|vls|Japan|vo|Yapän|war|Hapon|wa|Djapon|wo|Sapoŋ|wuu|日本|xal|Ниxуудин Нутг|xh|IJapani|xmf|იაპონია|yi|יאפאן|yo|Japan|za|Nyiedbonj|zea|Japan|zgh|ⵏⵉⴱⵓⵏ|zh_classical|日本|zh_min_nan|Ji̍t-pún|zh_yue|日本|zh|日本|zhnews|Category:日本|zhquote|日本|zhvoyage|日本|zu|IJaphani|qid=Q17|1=Japan}} == Corporate Number (Japan) (P3225) == * 7230005004223 == Commons category (P373) == * Ichihara-jinja, Namerikawa == has part(s) (P527) == * {{ill|Ichihara Shrine (Shimmei, Namerikawa City)|lt=Ichihara Shrine (Shimmei, Namerikawa City)|qid=Q135195016|1=Ichihara Shrine (Shimmei, Namerikawa City)}} ** P1352: {'amount': '+1', 'unit': '1'} ** P3831: {{ill|Q135022904|ltq=Q135022904|qid=Q135022904|1=Shikinai Ronsha}} * {{ill|Q135195017|ltq=Q135195017|qid=Q135195017|1=Ichihara Shrine (Yanagihara, Namerikawa City)}}Kokugakuin University Shrine database ** P1352: {'amount': '+2', 'unit': '1'} ** P3831: {{ill|Q135022904|ltq=Q135022904|qid=Q135022904|1=Shikinai Ronsha}} == street address (P6375) == * {'text': '富山県滑川市神明町1177', 'language': 'ja'} {{commons category|Category:Ichihara-jinja, Namerikawa}} [[JA:櫟原神社]] {{wikidata link|Q123115222}} == Japanese content == {{Otheruses|the shrine in Shinmei-chō, Namerikawa, Toyama, Japan|others}} {{神社 |名称= Ichihara Shrine |画像= [[File:Yanagihara, Namerikawa, Toyama Prefecture 936-0023, Japan - panoramio (1).jpg|250px|Ichihara Shrine]]
Haiden |所在地= {{ill|lt=Toyama Prefecture|Q132929|qid=Q132929|1=Toyama Prefecture}}{{ill|lt=Namerikawa|Q823513|qid=Q823513|1=Namerikawa, Toyama}} Shinmei-chō 1177 |位置= {{WikidataCoord|display=inline,title}} |祭神= {{ill|Susanoo-no-Mikoto|lt=Susanoo-no-Mikoto|qid=Q272993|1=Susanoo-no-Mikoto}} |社格= {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shikinaisha|1=Shikinaisha|qid=Q134917286}}, former {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=prefectural shrine|1=Ken-sha|qid=Q90139226}} |創建= before {{ill|lt=701|Q23496|qid=Q23496|1=701}} |本殿= |別名= Eastern ShrineFrom ''Kita Nihon Shimbun'', December 28, 2021, p.18, “Teku-teku Fudoki: Around Ichihara Shrine, Namerikawa City - preserving regional history and culture.” |例祭= {{ill|lt=June 15|Q2613|qid=Q2613|1=June 15}} - {{ill|lt=June 18|Q2670|qid=Q2670|1=June 18}} |神事= |地図= {{Location map|Japan Toyama|label=Ichihara Shrine|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=12|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|frame-height=200}} }} '''Ichihara Shrine''' (いちはらじんじゃ) is a {{ill|lt=Shinto shrine|Q845945|qid=Q845945|1=Shinto shrine}} in Shinmei-chō, {{ill|lt=Namerikawa|Q823513|qid=Q823513|1=Namerikawa, Toyama}}, {{ill|lt=Toyama Prefecture|Q132929|qid=Q132929|1=Toyama Prefecture}}. === Overview === A shrine along the old {{ill|lt=Hokuriku Road|Q3139239|qid=Q3139239|lt=Hokuriku highway|1=Hokurikudō}} in central Namerikawa. The founding year is unknown, but the {{ill|lt=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|Q11064932|qid=Q11064932|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō}} (published in {{ill|lt=927|Q30470|qid=Q30470|1=927}}) states “restored in {{ill|lt=701|Q23496|qid=Q23496|1=701}},” so it is thought to have been founded before the 8th century. Originally it stood about 2 km to the east, but moved to the current location during the {{ill|lt=Sengoku period (Japan)|Q204023|qid=Q204023|lt=Sengoku period|1=Sengoku period}}. The current main sanctuary was built in {{ill|lt=1872|Q7753|qid=Q7753|1=1872}}, and the worship hall in {{ill|lt=1915|Q2084|qid=Q2084|1=1915}}. Together with two torii in the precincts (built in {{ill|lt=1860|Q7691|qid=Q7691|1=1860}} and {{ill|lt=1921|Q2162|qid=Q2162|1=1921}}), they were registered as Japan’s {{ill|lt=Registered Tangible Cultural Properties|Q11579194|qid=Q11579194|1=Registered Tangible Cultural Property of Japan}} on {{ill|lt=June 28|Q2660|qid=Q2660|1=June 28}}, {{ill|lt=2017|Q25290|qid=Q25290|1=2017}}[https://toyama-bunkaisan.jp/search/2518/ 櫟原神社一の鳥居] (Toyama Cultural Heritage, viewed January 1, 2022). A proclamation by {{ill|lt=Uesugi Kagekatsu|Q1376605|qid=Q1376605|1=Uesugi Kagekatsu}} (issued in June {{ill|lt=1582|Q6719|qid=Q6719|1=1582}} after the {{ill|lt=Battle of Uozu Castle|Q11172490|qid=Q11172490|1=Siege of Uozu}}) is also preserved there. It is also known as “Higashi no Miya” (Eastern Shrine), and together with Kashima Yukishima Shrine in Kashima-chō (Nishi no Miya), it has been regarded as a guardian shrine of old Namerikawa Town. In the precincts there is a haiku monument erected by haiku poets of Namerikawa in devotion to {{ill|lt=Matsuo Bashō|Q5676|qid=Q5676|1=Matsuo Bashō}} (inscription: “Shibaraku wa hana no ue naru tsukiyo kana”). At the corner of the precincts there is also a night beacon for ship navigation (height 3.55 m, capstone width 1.55 m), donated in {{ill|lt=1815|Q6948|qid=Q6948|1=1815}} by Kawaseya, a lumber merchant and village head of Namerikawa-juku on the Hokuriku Road, to Kotohira-sha north of Ichihara Shrine''A Historical Walk of Toyama Prefecture'' (Yamakawa Publishing, issued March 31, 2013, 1st ed., 3rd printing), pp.44-45.. === Notes === {{脚注ヘルプ}} {{reflist}} === Related links === * {{Facebook|ichiharajinja}} {{shinto-stub}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Ichihara Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Ichihara Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Ichihara Shrine]][[Category:Disputed Shikinaisha or Shikigeisha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Etchū Province]] [[Category:富山県の神社]] [[Category:富山県の旧県社]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Etchū Province]] [[Category:滑川市の歴史]] [[Category:滑川市の建築物]] [[Category:富山県の登録有形文化財]]
